sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after SPACE
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

print("=== BEFORE SPACE ===")
for n in before['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"ID {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\n=== AFTER SPACE ===")
for n in after['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"ID {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check for differences
before_hashes = {n['hash'] for n in before['nodes']}
after_hashes = {n['hash'] for n in after['nodes']}
print("\n=== Hash diff ===")
print("New hashes:", after_hashes - before_hashes)
print("Removed hashes:", before_hashes - after_hashes)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
